arts.ttl: FC Copenhagen vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea’s European campaign resumes tonight as they play FC Copenhagen in the Europa Conference League knockout stages. Enzo Maresca and his players were a force to be reckoned with in the league phase to progress with a perfect record. Cole Palmer is now eligible to appear in this competition after being omitted from the initial […] The post FC Copenhagen vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Todd Boehly 'contacts' Barcelona duo as Chelsea plan transfer raid
arts.sum: Chelsea co-owner Todd Boehly has contacted Barcelona duo Jules Kounde and Marc Casado over a possible summer move to Stamford Bridge, according to a sensational report in Spain. The former is expected to snub interest from Chelsea in order to remain at Camp Nou for the foreseeable future, however Casado is reportedly tempted by the possibility of joining the five-time Premier League champions later this year.

arts.ttl: Report: Man United star Kobbie Mainoo has one clear demand from Chelsea if they want to sign him this summer
Chelsea want to make a ‘couple new signings’ before Club World Cup, £50m striker could be one of them - journalist
arts.sum: A great way to start the summer!

arts.ttl: Chelsea confirm 21-man squad vs Copenhagen as Enzo Maresca issues double injury update
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has issued injury updates on four Chelsea players before the Conference League game against Copenhagen with their travelling squad to Denmark confirmed. Maresca has also confirmed Robert Sanchez will start in goal while the likes of Mathis Amougou or Shim Mhueka could get their first taste of European football at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues need to forget Milos Kerkez and re-sign another academy star
arts.sum: Chelsea should be pointed in the direction of a familiar face: Aston Villa left-back Ian Maatsen . Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez is going to leave several clubs very disappointed this summer, but there is a strong alternative that they will be able to study instead.
